text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The end of summer camp is around the corner.
Agnes Digital has been training with a frenzy she's
never shown before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I'm melting... I feel like I'm gonna turn into some kind of jelly and melt right into the Earth...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've run myself to the limit, Trainer. But now, when
I face off against Opera O, Doto, and the
classic-year cutie...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won't lie to you—I have no confidence
whatsoever! Especially against Opera O and
Doto. They're both so good.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I'm an all-rounder. I just have to pile up all
the different experiences I can...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That is until I get a trick up my sleeve for any
situation! That's all I can do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how high she must climb to overcome
her obstacles, Agnes Digital remains unfazed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, at night...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Okay. These are the predicted runners for the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, it's gonna be a three-way
contest of skill.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Three? I don't mean to contradict you,
but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Don't you mean four-way? Opera O, Doto, me, and the girl who won the NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait! Have I been dropped?! Is my reputation too low? Am I the weakest link?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch. Not you. The girl who won the NHK Mile
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
She probably won't get in, so I doubt she'll be in
the race at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Why wouldn't she get in?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Cause there's more entrants than slots.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As things stand, she's not getting in unless
someone else pulls out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I bet she'd have what it takes, though. The
media's been hyping her up as "the hope of a new
generation" and saying she could overthrow the
seniors.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But we have to face facts. There's no arguing with
the numbers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She won't... get to run... just because of the
number of slots...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, the same night, Agnes Digital is listless at
the beach.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is this really how it is, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She's blazing with potential! She's growing so
much right now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But despite all that, she can't even run? The
goddess of fate is really too cruel.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But then again, the Twinkle Series itself is cruel.
You win and you lose—no one makes it all the
way through with dry eyes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But after you've shed your tears, inspiration
always waits on the other side! That's exactly why
we can look each other in the eyes and square off
the way we do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, can you imagine how sad it would be if we
couldn't even run? There would only be emptiness
after the tears.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As someone who loves Umamusume... it's honestly
unbearable... Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm snatching her dream away by running...
If that's the case...
choice_data_list: Don't even think of dropping out.
Don't even think of dropping out.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Why not? Though it's my dream to run alongside
Opera O and Doto...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With the way things are right now, I don't feel like
I can win. And if I run feeling like that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I... definitely can't.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: How... How do I accept this situation?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It isn't unlike Agnes Digital to sympathize with
others so much that you'd think their
circumstances were her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's because she loves all Umamusume. The tragic
fate of this younger racer has grabbed her by the
ankles and pulled her heart underwater.
